DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S ("CCSF") MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. CCSF'S ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED.
